title: Wings Of Fire!
description: Ever Wanted to ride a Phoenix? Now you can! Find 6 different phoenix eggs around your world and treat them to hatch your new mount!
body:
![Wings of Fire!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0440ac721c377a6b6bb6e2e580bc659f14621d5b.png)

**WINGS OF FIRE** Is a mod that adds **SIX different Phoenix Breeds** to Minecraft! Find eggs around your world and hatch them to create powerful new mounts!

![Find Phoenix eggs in chests, and warm them up in the new INFERNO CRADLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97341ce45b01f4668bafeb1b957c3d2f46476442.png)
Find **PETRIFIED** Phoenix Eggs in different structures in your world, and warm them up inside the new **INFERNO CRADLE** block. After 15 minutes, your phoenix egg will be warmed up!

(Using magma cream on an unignited inferno cradle lets you light it for decorative purposes)

![Combining your warmed up egg and the new TEMPERED LANTERN in a crafting table will bind the two!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b5a4b0ba25cba5071d155594081c95a7f61dde9.png)

Combining your newly warm Phoenix Eggs with **TEMPERED LANTERNS**, a new item, will bind the lantern and the egg,  giving you the item capable of summoning the legendary phoenix!

![Right click your bound tempered lantern to summon your phoenix!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad54132127212b9a06b6dbdff15edaffeffc83c_0.webp)

Right click your bound lantern to summon your Phoenix! You automatically begin to ride the phoenix once summoned, and once you get off, **POOF!** _(beware of fall damage!)_

![Find al collect all 6!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc7d10010f1ca34f6ca291420fea9344aca17b0.png)
Find and collect all 6 different breeds, with more to come in future updates!

The different eggs are located in the following structures:
**
Fire Phoenix: **          Woodland Mansions & Pillager Outposts

**Wind Phoenix:**         Abandoned Mineshafts

**Red Phoenix:  **        Nether Fortresses

**Nature Phoenix:  **     Jungle Temples

**Dark Phoenix:  **       Ancient Cities

**Gilded Phoenix:  **     Bastion Remnants





RECIPES FOR THE INFERNO CRADLE & TEMPERED LANTERN:
![Combine 5 iron ingots, 2 iron bars, and a blaze powder to craft the INFERNO CRADLE. Combine 6 iron ingots, a lantern, and 2 blaze powder to craft the TEMPERED LANTERN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d26c0c95cc5b962cdabbd07d8150e1e225e0df6_0.webp)

_I permit the use of this mod in any modpack_
_
Inferno Cradle and Phoenix Texture by @TheModderG - HUGE thank you for helping me redesign these, they came out looking great!_
